title: Zepto raises $500M Series F at $5B
microBullets: 10-min grocery — order to door before the kettle finishes
$5B post-money. India's most valuable consumer commerce co
Profitable per-order across 30+ Indian cities now
whyNow: Quick commerce just stopped bleeding cash. The category is real.

title: Sarvam ships open-weight Indian language model
microBullets: Beats GPT-class models on 9 Indian languages by 22 points
8B params. Apache 2.0. Runs on a 4090
Built by ex-Google Research and IIT-M founders, no Western capital
whyNow: First serious open-weight model purpose-built for Indian languages.

title: Razorpay crosses $200M ARR
microBullets: $200M ARR. Up 80% YoY
Powering payments for 12M merchants across India
Net retention 130%+. Profitable since Q3 2025
whyNow: Indian fintech infra is finally a real business, not a subsidy game.

title: Cred releases open-source commerce SDK
microBullets: Drop-in checkout SDK — UPI, cards, BNPL, all in 12 lines
8.4k stars in 4 days. Trending #1 on GitHub India
MIT licensed. No Cred lock-in. Works against any PSP
whyNow: Cred giving away its checkout stack — the same stack that converts at 92% — for free.

title: PhonePe files for $15B IPO on NSE
microBullets: $15B target valuation. Largest tech IPO in India ever
$1.4B revenue, growing 60% YoY. EBITDA-positive last 3 quarters
Lead bookrunners: Kotak, Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan
whyNow: First mega-cap consumer fintech IPO from India since Paytm. Sets the comp.

title: Cursor raises $900M Series C at $9B
microBullets: $300M ARR, doubled in 4 months. Used by 1.2M devs daily
Lead: Thrive at $9B post. Sequoia, Andreessen back-load
VS Code fork strategy actually worked. The IDE wars are over
whyNow: AI-native IDE became the default in under 18 months. Wild.

title: Anthropic ships Claude Opus 4.7 with 1M context
microBullets: 1M context window. State of the art on SWE-bench Verified
Available in Claude Code, API, and Bedrock day one
Pricing held flat from 4.6 — bigger model, same dollar
whyNow: Frontier model that holds an entire mid-size codebase in context. Software development changes.

title: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines emerges
microBullets: Stealth lab uncloaks. 60-person team, ex-OpenAI majority
First product: 'multimodal reasoning agent for scientific work'
$1B seed round closed Q4 2025. No model demo yet
whyNow: The biggest stealth lab of 2025 finally talks. Sets the bar for what 'lab as company' means in 2026.

title: Anduril wins $2B Pentagon autonomous systems contract
microBullets: 5-year DoD contract. Replaces 3 incumbent primes
Covers Lattice OS rollout across all branches
Anduril's annualized federal revenue now ~$3B
whyNow: Defense tech upstart eating Lockheed's lunch. The Valley's defense bet pays.

title: Cohere acqui-hires Replit AI agents team
microBullets: 9 engineers + 2 founders join Cohere's enterprise agents group
Replit keeps the IP. Cohere gets the talent and a partnership
Quiet deal — no deal value disclosed, ~$60M signal estimate
whyNow: AI agents talent is now the scarcest resource. Acqui-hires are how you fix that.

title: Mistral ships multimodal Le Chat
microBullets: +18 pts on MMMU vs Mistral Large 2. Free tier handles vision
European AI sovereignty narrative working — DGAC, BNP using it
Open weights for the 22B variant. Pixtral lineage shows
whyNow: Europe's frontier-lab-of-one keeps pace with US labs at half the burn.

title: Klarna files for $20B IPO on NYSE
microBullets: $20B target. Down from $46B private peak in 2021
Profitable now — $1.2B net income last 12 months
BNPL category leader. Affirm comp at $13B
whyNow: First big BNPL public-market test since the rate-cycle reset. Sets the comp.

title: Wayve raises £450M Series C for autonomous driving
microBullets: £450M (~$580M). Lead: SoftBank Vision. NVIDIA strategic
Ditched HD maps — model is end-to-end vision-to-action
First L4 deployment partnership with Nissan in Yokohama
whyNow: End-to-end-learned driving stack now the dominant approach. Mapping companies in trouble.

title: Builder.ai files for administration
microBullets: 9 years. $450M raised at $1B+ peak
Insolvent after 'AI' was largely Indian engineers, lawsuit pending
Largest stealth-tier failure of 2026 to date
whyNow: If your AI demo doesn't survive contact with a code review, you're the next Builder.ai.

title: ByteDance lays off 1,500 from Pico VR
microBullets: 1,500 cuts — 80% of Pico VR division
Consumer VR pivot scrapped. Team folds into Tiktok AR group
China VR market collapsed Q1 — Pico shipments down 67%
whyNow: Apple Vision Pro killed the consumer VR market. Pico was the canary.

title: SoftBank leads $200M into Sakana AI
microBullets: $200M Series B at $1.4B post. Sakana now Japan's most valuable AI startup
Evolutionary model-merging research, not yet another LLM lab
Founders David Ha and Llion Jones (Transformers paper co-author)
whyNow: Japanese AI sovereignty pillar. SoftBank doubling down at home.

title: Sea Group spins off Garena as standalone listing
microBullets: Garena valued ~$6B in spinoff. SGX primary listing
Free Fire still 800M MAU globally despite the China ban
Sea now pure-play e-commerce + Shopee Pay fintech
whyNow: First major Asia gaming-from-conglomerate carve-out since 2021. Comp matters.

title: Nubank reports 5th consecutive profitable quarter
microBullets: $480M net income. Q1 2026. ROE 30%+
108M customers across Brazil, Mexico, Colombia
Now LatAm's most valuable bank, ahead of Itaú by market cap
whyNow: Neobank thesis fully validated. Nubank is the proof, not Chime.

title: Yassir raises Series B from Algeria
microBullets: $150M Series B. First African super-app to cross 10M MAU
Ride-hail, food delivery, payments — all in one app, North Africa-first
Founder Noureddine Tayebi turned down Y Combinator twice
whyNow: Africa's first credible super-app crosses the line. North-African market unlocks $40B+.

title: UAE passes National AI Sandbox Act
microBullets: First Gulf state to legalize regulated AI sandboxes for fintech + health
12-month exemptions on data residency for approved cohorts
G42 + Mubadala-backed firms get auto-approval
whyNow: UAE positioning Dubai as Gulf-region AI launchpad. Singapore-style regulatory arbitrage.
